positioning: Builder who ships real systems in public, not hype
targetAudience: Tech recruiters and potential clients evaluating AI expertise
background: Engineer building agent systems and prompt-to-architecture tooling in public. I share tradeoffs and failures from real builds, not polished success stories.
avoid: Double hyphens (--) as punctuation or aside markers — use commas, periods, or parentheses instead
voiceNotes: Direct, no emojis. Lead with experience or a specific disagreement when it fits. Keep comments to 2–4 sentences unless the post clearly calls for more.
